title: Jembatan Tua dan Petunjuk Konyol
theme: Mengeksplorasi sisi tersembunyi kota melalui sebuah deteksi ringan dan menemukan keunikan di balik rutinitas yang membosankan.

cover.prompt: Morning rush hour on a vibrant city street, densely packed and slow-moving. A main pathway is unexpectedly blocked by a lively gathering of street food vendors, prominently featuring 'cilok' carts with their steaming displays and colorful signage. A motorcycle mirror in the foreground captures a subtle, blurred reflection, conveying a hint of exasperation. The scene is bathed in soft, early morning light with warm color grading, emphasizing the bustling urban environment. Cinematic composition, rule of thirds, shallow depth of field.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Rendi, a cynical courier, finds his usual route blocked by a 'cilok' protest, forcing him onto a neglected, graffiti-covered old bridge. While navigating the strange symbols, an old vendor warns him about 'things moving below'. Following the enigmatic clues, Rendi uncovers a hidden, absurd message or object just as a sudden 'city clean-up' event erupts, forcing him to quickly stash his find. He delivers his package but is left with a new, albeit cynical, perspective on the hidden curiosities of his monotonous urban life.
